label: Ledge_clipping_label
reason: Mario moves up the red-carpeted stairs hugging the left brick wall, then makes a short hop into the wall/ledge seam. Immediately after, the scene cuts to Mario in the black void below the level and inside the lobby geometry before he reappears behind the pillar. This abrupt out-of-bounds transition without BLJ motion or other special actions matches the ledge-based wall clip shown in the visual example.
